hero.title: English Made Fun — With AI by Your Side
hero.subtitle: From elementary school to the boardroom. Your AI conversation partner and expert tutors turn "I wish I could speak English" into "I just did." Practice 24/7, at your own pace.

ai.title: AI Conversation Partner
ai.description: Your personal English coach, available 24/7. Practice with text, voice, and roleplay — from business English to casual conversation, adapted to your level.

courses.title: English Courses
courses.description: TOEIC, Eiken, and daily conversation. CEFR-aligned A1-C2 curriculum, from elementary English basics to TOEIC 900+ prep.

tutors.title: Online English Lessons
tutors.description: One-on-one with pro tutors. Video lessons with certified and native tutors. Book from 4 lessons/month, whenever it suits you.

pricing.title: Pricing Plans
pricing.subtitle: Choose the plan that fits you
pricing.heroSubtitle: Start free, upgrade when you're ready. Cancel anytime.
pricing.trustLine: No credit card required for free plan

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.a1: Yes! Upgrade, downgrade, or cancel at any time. Changes take effect at your next billing cycle.
faq.a2: Yes, we offer a 14-day money-back guarantee on all paid plans. No questions asked.
faq.q3: What payment methods do you accept?
faq.a3: We accept all major credit cards, debit cards, and convenience store payments (コンビニ払い).
faq.q4: Can I try tutoring before subscribing?
faq.a4: Pro and Premium plans include live tutor lessons. Start with Pro to try it out!

coursesPage.title: Structured English Courses
coursesPage.subtitle: From beginner to advanced — CEFR-aligned curriculum that takes you from "Hello" to fluent, step by step.

beginner.title: Beginner
beginner.description: Basic greetings, self-introduction, simple conversations. Perfect for elementary and junior high students.

intermediate.title: Intermediate
intermediate.description: Travel English, workplace communication, TOEIC prep. For high school students and working professionals.

advanced.title: Advanced
advanced.description: Business presentations, debate, academic writing. For those aiming for native-level fluency.

interactive.title: Interactive Exercises
interactive.description: Not just reading — practice with quizzes, fill-in-the-blanks, and speaking exercises

progress.title: Track Your Progress
progress.description: Visual progress bars, completion badges, and weekly reports show exactly how far you've come

pace.title: Learn at Your Pace
